description: Frozen Horizontal Pattern Unit catalog for VLTE-BPTM v1.1. Order is part of the reviewable catalog, while selector ranking remains score-based.

units.label: Exploration
units.rationale: Generate and compare alternatives without committing to an implementation.

units.label: Implementation
units.rationale: Turn an accepted intent into an implementation-oriented plan or artifact.

units.label: Verification
units.rationale: Check assumptions, evidence, risks, and correctness before concluding.

units.label: Compression
units.rationale: Compress the input while preserving required decisions and salient facts.

units.label: Clarification
units.rationale: Ask for information required to continue when the request is underspecified.

units.label: Direct Response
units.rationale: Provide the default direct response, including greetings and straightforward answers.
